title: paspalum scrobiculatum var. horneri
intro: Paspalum scrobiculatum var. horneri, a variant of the Paspalum scrobiculatum species, is a type of grass commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion. The health benefits of Paspalum scrobiculatum var. horneri include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, and it can also be processed into powders or tinctures for medicinal use.
